dynamodb.timetolivespecification.CfnAbou: Represents the settings used to enable or disable Time to Live (TTL) for the specified table.

dynamodb.timetolivespecification.Attribu.Description: The name of the TTL attribute used to store the expiration time for items in the table.  To update this property, you must first disable TTL then enable TTL with the new attribute name.

dynamodb.timetolivespecification.Enabled.Description: Indicates whether TTL is to be enabled (true) or disabled (false) on the table.
